metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5204
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 4: Time-lapse fluorescence micrographs of ELMO1-TagRFP-transfected dissociated hippocampal neurons of wildtype and KIF21B knockout mice at DIV 21 before (0') and after (20') chemical LTD induction with NMDA. Imaging data shows ELMO1 at dendritic spines and translocating to the dendritic shaft upon stimulus.. Experimental description: Mice were used throughout the study.
"SUPPLEMENTAL EXPERIMENTAL PROCEDURES
Mice
A Kif21b-knockout mouse line was established by homologous recombination of C57BL/6-derived RENKA
ES cells based on a previously described protocol (Mishina and Sakimura, 2007)."

construct:
"For the ELMO1-TagRFP and ELMO1-ECFP expression vectors, the mouse ELMO1-GFP vector kindly provided by Dr. Kodi S. Ravichandran (University of Virginia) and Dr. Huaye Zhang (Rutgers University) was subcloned with pTagRFP-N and pECFP-N1 (Clontech), respectively. For the KIF21B-EGFP expression vectors, mouse Kif21b cDNA was cloned from a sequence-verified individual ORF clone ID: 100062617 (DNAFORM)
and ligated with pEGFP-N1 (Clontech)."

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
